description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a vertically striped, button-up shirt with a collar and long sleeves, paired with straight-cut pants and casual shoes. The shirt features a classic design with visible buttons and a slightly loose fit, while the pants are plain and extend to the ankles. The figure's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are relaxed and open. The head is sculpted with short, neatly styled hair, and the facial features are well-defined, including a trimmed beard and mustache. The shoes are low-profile and appear to be slip-on or lace-up casual footwear. The overall appearance suggests a casual yet slightly formal urban pedestrian, suitable for city streets or public spaces.
description: An adult male in a striped button-up shirt, straight pants, and casual shoes, with short styled hair and a trimmed beard, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the striped shirt, straight pants, and the back of the head with short hair.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the shirt's fit, the relaxed arm, and the side of the face with visible facial features.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the button-up shirt, facial details, outstretched arms, and the front of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the shirt's drape, the relaxed right arm, and the side of the face.
attribute_clothing_type: collared button-up shirt with vertical stripes and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
